title: [Bug]: Does not work if the machine is set to default in wsl.
body:
### Issue Description

When executing the 'podman machine start' command, the following message appears.

``` bat
> podman machine start

API forwarding for Docker API clients is not available due to the following startup failures.
        could not start api proxy since expected pipe is not available: podman-machine-default
```

While looking for the cause, I found out that the above error occurred when podman's WSL distro was set to the default.
The cause will be described in **Additional information** below.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. wsl --set-default podman-machine-default
2. podman machine start

### Describe the results you received

```could not start api proxy since expected pipe is not available: podman-machine-default``` messsage appear

### Describe the results you expected

Normal execution of podman

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

**Summary**: When running wsl --list --running, the running wsl distribution name is appended with **(default)**, causing  problems.  


There is a function to check whether wsl is normally running in **isWSLRunning** in **machine.go**

``` go
// machine.go
func isWSLRunning(dist string) (bool, error) {
       // Check the running wsl distribution.
	cmd := exec.Command("wsl", "-l", "--running") 
        ....

       // Receive cmd's stdout as a string and check if there is podman distribution text.
	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(transform.NewReader(out, unicode.UTF16(unicode.LittleEndian, unicode.UseBOM).NewDecoder()))
	result := false
	for scanner.Scan() {
		fields := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())
		if len(fields) > 0 && dist == fields[0] {
			result = true
			break
		}
	}

}

```
Check the running wsl distro as a string value.  

However, if the actual podman is specified as the default value for wsl, the result will be false even though podman is operating normally.  

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/25363091/214738379-665c00a8-5b9f-4260-80f9-97911962058e.png)

``` bat
> wsl --list --running
Linux용 Windows 하위 시스템 배포:
podman-machine-default(default)
```

Therefore, it would be nice to add the actual distribution name and the --quiet option to remove the header.

``` bat
> wsl --list --running --quiet
podman-machine-default
```

If there is no wsl distribution, the first wsl distribution is always set to the default.
